title: Set Passthru
description: Sends a pass-through command to a reader component.

command.description: The value for the key command must be set_passthru

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

component.description: Target reader component to send the pass-through command to.

payload.description: Pass-through payload. Valid values include: mode, status.
